---
title: "Stochastic Processes for Modeling"
subtitle: "Core Mathematics — Year 2"
date: "2025-01-01"
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
number-sections: true
---

# Stochastic Processes for Modeling

**Track**: Core Mathematics — Year 2

Stochastic processes provide the mathematical framework for modeling randomness that evolves over time. This course covers the major process types used across all domain tracks.

## Table of Contents

1. Discrete-Time Markov Chains
2. Continuous-Time Markov Chains
3. Poisson Processes and Generalizations
4. Renewal Theory
5. Branching Processes
6. Brownian Motion and Diffusion Processes
7. Stochastic Differential Equations
8. Markov Random Fields and Spatial Stochastic Processes

---

## Chapter 1: Discrete-Time Markov Chains

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 2: Continuous-Time Markov Chains

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 3: Poisson Processes and Generalizations

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 4: Renewal Theory

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 5: Branching Processes

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 6: Brownian Motion and Diffusion Processes

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 7: Stochastic Differential Equations

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*

## Chapter 8: Markov Random Fields and Spatial Stochastic Processes

*This chapter has not yet been generated. Run the generation pipeline to produce full content.*
